stemHtml: Which of the following situations may cause a fume event aboard an aircraft?

options.a: Burning interior, spilled anti-ice fluid, forbidden items in carry-on baggage.
options.b: Overheating brakes after gear retraction, damaged pump in the air cycle machine, loss of pressurisation.
options.c: Unmixed bleed air in air conditioning ducts, APU fire, failure of hydraulic flight controls.
options.d: Engine fire, smoking in toilets, electrical short-circuits.
